title: Zoomies
description: An enjoyable zoom mod with some interesting features.
body: # Zoomies An enjoyable zooming mod. ![Zoomies Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/185d8821566cc5ec510b3c2f7439fc207ba77ee6.png) ![Customization and overlays showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/feaeae7b926d05c0c1b11ab58aa5c7a79a7c7ac3.gif) **Kinda bored of your current zooming mod?** There are not many* drawbacks to transferring here! ``` (*If you find any key differences or core components missing, create a github issue!) ``` The goal of zoomies is to maintain feature matching to popular zoom mods, whilst adding unique features to make it special. Features: - A few different zooming indicator UIs - Entity information overlay - Mod integration - Configurable - And more! Zoom in style rather than denial Configurations (open with /zoomies or through mod menu): - Smooth zooming (and the speed) - Scroll zooming sensitivity - Normalizing of mouse sensitivity - Disabling view bobbing - Vignette options - Showing block coordinates of the block you're zooming on in - Xaero's Minimap waypoint types - Lots of things about an entities information - Customisable colour theme What's planned? - Keeping up with the competitors [Check out my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/electricdog)
